unit.name: hooks/plugin-api shell emitter
unit.public_contract: plugin.php and class-wp-hook.php public shell emitted by source transforms plus Haxe runtime boundary calls

bridge.reason: The public PHP shell is no longer authored as a broad JavaScript template, but it still preserves native PHP callback, reference, global, declaration, and include behavior while delegating typed decisions to Haxe.

removal_gate.condition: Promote the hook/plugin API workset to verified_haxe_owned after distribution provenance, source maps, and any remaining public ABI bridges are reviewed and approved as stable rather than temporary.

notes: WPHX-305 replaces the broad JS-authored public shell bodies with a source-to-source emitter that starts from the locked WordPress 7.0 oracle files and applies counted transforms for the Haxe runtime boundary. WPHX-306 owns final verified distribution-surface promotion.
